title: TeraWulf Inc (WULF) Receives a New Rating from Northland Securities
text: Northland Securities raised the firm's price target on TeraWulf to $30 from $23.25 and keeps an Outperform rating on the shares. This upgrade reflects confidence in TeraWulf's strategic transition from Bitcoin mining to AI and high-performance computing infrastructure. The upgrade came amid broader analyst enthusiasm for the company's transition strategy, with multiple analysts raising price targets in May 2026. Northland's outperform rating aligns with consensus expectations that TeraWulf's HPC leasing business will provide more stable, predictable revenues compared to volatile Bitcoin mining operations. The company's success in securing long-term contracts with investment-grade counterparties like Core42 and Fluidstack has been a key driver of analyst optimism.
